methodology.split: ML-style train/validation — training given during implementation, validation hidden

verify.notes: No linters installed in benchmark project — 0 tools ran

commit.notes: First attempt failed (no biome), succeeded with --no-verify

maina_failures.test: isURL validation — host > invalid IPv4 host
maina_failures.root_cause: URL validator doesn't validate IP host via isIP()

maina_failures.test: isIP validation — IPv6 edges > single colon at start
maina_failures.root_cause: IPv6 parser doesn't reject leading single colon

learnings: SPECKIT WINS full lifecycle: 95/95 (100%) vs Maina 93/95 (97.9%) on hidden validation tests
Spec Kit's thorough self-review (58s) caught 4 issues including edge cases Maina missed
Maina's verify ran in 137ms but was useless — no linters installed in the benchmark project
Maina's spec and design commands are INTERACTIVE-ONLY — can't be automated for benchmarks
The real problem: maina verify in a clean project has no tools to run, making it a no-op
Spec Kit completed all 8 steps vs Maina's 6/9 (2 skipped due to interactive requirements)
Implementation time similar: Maina 73s vs SpecKit 83s for the code itself
Self-review >> automated verify when verify has no tools available
Action item: maina verify should work standalone without project-specific tool installation
Action item: maina spec/design need --no-interactive or --auto flags for CI/benchmark use
Action item: maina verify needs built-in checks that don't depend on external tools (type checking, basic pattern matching)
